content:
Junior Programs

The ESC is dedicated to growing the sport of squash in Edmonton, and there is no better way to
do this than to support our junior players. We offer everything from school programs, novice 1:1 or
group lessons, summer camps, junior tournaments, and high-performance programs for the next
generation of great Canadian players!

After inconsistent scheduling over the course of the COVID-19 health restrictions, the Edmonton Squash Club is excited to offer a full Junior Squash Program once again! The Junior Program will run from September – June. This program has many new players joining all of the time but we also have experienced Juniors that are working towards competing in Junior tournaments and more! Our programs offer professional coaching so your athletes learn excellent technique and tactics in a fun and positive atmosphere. Jeff Williams is the main coach for our Junior program and he brings over 20+ years of coaching experience in Edmonton and has worked with many juniors to compete at the provincial and national level.
